picks.quote: I think in this type of a match-up, considering that the path is so clear for Diego Lopez, take the fight to where you have a clear advantage.
I could see him coming out here with a wrestling heavy game plan... I could see a path for Chandler to come out here and grapple a bit
I like Josh Barnett and I got a same game parlay here.
I still like Sean O'Malley quite a bit this week. He should be able to get the job done.
I like the upside for Pereira. So, for -165, took a tiny little core units tab on that
Ilia Topuria is one of these guys where he has talked the talk and he has walked the walk... I'm riding with it.
